jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Navin's - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navin's. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Property Consultant to strengthen our Ludhiana-based team.

About Navin's:
Navin's is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navin's!
